title: MTL Pulse — Complete Dataset Schema Reference
description: Comprehensive mapping of every dataset ingested by MTL Pulse: open data sources, API details, raw field mappings, database schemas, pipeline schedules, and computed metrics.

crime_incidents.description: Criminal acts reported to the SPVM (Service de police de la Ville de Montréal). Includes category of crime, date, shift, police district (PDQ), and location.
crime_incidents.backfillStrategy: 5 years on first run, incremental after

columns.name: boroughCode
columns.description: Derived from PDQ via lookup table

computedMetrics.name: crime_count_daily
computedMetrics.description: Total crimes on a given day

computedMetrics.name: crime_count_7d
computedMetrics.description: Crime count over rolling 7-day window with previous 7d comparison

computedMetrics.name: crime_delta_vs_prev_7d
computedMetrics.description: Percentage change in crime this week vs previous week

computedMetrics.name: crime_vs_30d_avg
computedMetrics.description: Current week crime count as ratio of 30-day daily average * 7

travaux.description: Active road obstructions and construction work projects across Montreal. Tracks permits with start/end dates, responsible organizations, and affected streets.
travaux.backfillStrategy: Full download each run (CSV contains all active works)

computedMetrics.name: active_travaux_count
computedMetrics.description: Count of currently active construction works (status like actif/active/en cours/ouvert, end_date >= today)

computedMetrics.name: new_travaux_today
computedMetrics.description: New works first seen today

construction_permits.description: Building permits issued by the city of Montreal. Includes permit type (construction, transformation, demolition, certificate), estimated cost, building type, and location.

source.fetchMethod: CKAN DataStore SQL (NOT the 172MB full CSV)

schedule.description: Weekly on Sunday at midnight ET (05:00 UTC)

computedMetrics.name: permits_count_week
computedMetrics.description: Number of permits issued this week vs previous week

computedMetrics.name: permits_total_value_week
computedMetrics.description: Total estimated cost of permits this week in CAD

road_obstructions.displayName: Road Obstructions (Entraves à la circulation — CIFS)
road_obstructions.description: Real-time road obstructions from the CIFS (Common Incident Feed Standard) feed. Full replace on each fetch — represents current state of road closures, detours, and obstructions.
road_obstructions.backfillStrategy: FULL REPLACE — deletes all rows and reinserts on every run. Previous state archived in obstruction_snapshots.

computedMetrics.name: active_obstructions
computedMetrics.description: Total current road obstructions

requests_311.description: Citizen service requests submitted via 311. Tracks nature of request, type, status, borough, creation date and closure date. Covers all municipal services (potholes, graffiti, noise complaints, etc.).

schedule.description: Weekly on Sunday at midnight ET

requests_311.backfillStrategy: 5 years on first run, incremental 7 days after

columns.name: closedAt
columns.description: Set when status is 'Fermé' or contains 'terminée'

computedMetrics.name: requests_311_new_today
computedMetrics.description: New 311 requests created today

computedMetrics.name: requests_311_open
computedMetrics.description: Total open (non-closed) 311 requests

computedMetrics.name: requests_311_avg_resolution_days
computedMetrics.description: Average resolution time in days (closedAt - createdAt)

fire_interventions.description: Fire department (Service de sécurité incendie de Montréal) interventions. Includes incident type, station, number of units dispatched, and location.

computedMetrics.name: fire_interventions_7d
computedMetrics.description: Fire interventions in rolling 7-day window

computedMetrics.name: fire_false_alarm_rate
computedMetrics.description: Percentage of interventions that are false alarms (type LIKE '%fausses alertes%')

pothole_repairs.description: Mechanized pothole filling operations. Data comes from multiple yearly resources (2016-2020); 2021+ is GPKG-only and not currently processed.

source.notes: 2021+ data is GPKG-only format, not currently processed

columns.name: boroughCode
columns.description: Not in source data; would need geocoding

computedMetrics.name: potholes_repaired_ytd
computedMetrics.description: Total potholes repaired year-to-date

computedMetrics.name: potholes_repaired_7d
computedMetrics.description: Potholes repaired in rolling 7-day window

snow_towings.description: Vehicle towing records during snow removal operations. Seasonal (winter). Includes reason, location, sector. Pre-November 2015 data has no GPS coordinates.

computedMetrics.name: towing_count_today
computedMetrics.description: Towings today

computedMetrics.name: towing_count_7d
computedMetrics.description: Towings in rolling 7-day window

bedbug_reports.description: Bedbug extermination declarations. Tracks number of exterminations per report, location, and borough. Data updated quarterly.

computedMetrics.name: bedbug_reports_ytd
computedMetrics.description: Bedbug reports year-to-date

air_quality.displayName: Air Quality (RSQA — Réseau de surveillance de la qualité de l'air)
air_quality.description: Hourly air quality readings from RSQA monitoring stations across Montreal. Tracks pollutant levels (PM2.5, O3, NO2, SO2, CO) by station.

sourceFields.name: pollutant
sourceFields.description: Pollutant type (PM2.5, O3, NO2, SO2, CO)

computedMetrics.name: air_quality_current
computedMetrics.description: Max air quality index value in last 7 days (across all stations/pollutants)

cycling_counts.description: Daily bicycle volume from permanent cycling counters across Montreal. Data organized by year with separate resource IDs per year (2020-2026).

computedMetrics.name: cycling_volume_today
computedMetrics.description: Total cyclist volume across all counters today

water_breaks.displayName: Water Main Breaks (Réparations réseau eau potable)
water_breaks.description: Water main break repairs across Montreal. Data since 1972. Includes break type, pipe material, diameter, and location.
water_breaks.backfillStrategy: Full history from 1972-01-01 on first run, 30 days incremental after

computedMetrics.name: water_breaks_ytd
computedMetrics.description: Water main breaks year-to-date

road_conditions.description: Road surface quality survey data. Uses PCI (Pavement Condition Index) and IRI (International Roughness Index) to grade road segments. Data from survey years 2010-2024.

source.fetchMethod: CKAN DataStore SQL (multiple survey year resources)

contracts.description: City contracts and procurement from two sources: Conseil municipal and Conseil d'agglomération. Includes contract type, supplier, amount, and awarding body.

computedMetrics.name: contracts_value_ytd
computedMetrics.description: Total contract value year-to-date in CAD

elected_officials.description: List of elected officials of the City of Montreal. Includes function type, party affiliation, and borough. Full replace on each run.
elected_officials.backfillStrategy: FULL REPLACE — deletes all rows and reinserts

computedMetrics.name: elected_officials_count
computedMetrics.description: Count of elected officials

boroughs.description: Reference table of Montreal's 19 boroughs with administrative boundaries (GeoJSON geometry), population data, and 3-letter codes used throughout the system.

pipeline_runs.description: Logs every pipeline execution with status, record counts, duration, and errors. Used by the /admin/pipelines monitoring dashboard.

snapshots.description: Logs every data fetch attempt with SHA256 hash for change detection. If hash matches previous successful fetch, data processing is skipped.

dataset_records.description: Generic key-value store for datasets that don't have a dedicated table. Stores full record as JSONB with optional date, location, and borough metadata.

daily_metrics.description: Pre-aggregated daily metrics by date, borough, and category. Used by legacy aggregation engine. Being superseded by computed_metrics.

computed_metrics.description: Primary metrics table for the dashboard. Stores current and previous values per metric/borough/period. Frontend ONLY reads from this table, never raw tables.

daily_digests.description: Legacy AI-generated daily summaries in French and English. Being superseded by unified digests table.

digests.description: Unified table for all AI-generated digests: daily, weekly, or borough-specific. Stores title, summary, highlights, stats, and token usage metadata.

obstruction_snapshots.description: Archives the full CIFS feed on every fetch for historical analysis. Each row contains the entire JSON response from the road obstructions API.

dataset_registry.description: Catalog of all Montreal open data datasets discovered via CKAN crawl. Tracks metadata, pipeline status, and priority tier for 281+ datasets.

specialJobs.name: compute_metrics
specialJobs.description: Runs all metric definitions against raw tables and upserts results into computed_metrics. Iterates every metric × every borough + city-wide.

specialJobs.name: generate_daily_digest
specialJobs.description: Generates AI-powered daily summary using Claude Sonnet. Reads from computed_metrics and raw tables, produces bilingual (FR/EN) digests.
